text:
## Supervisor guidance for evolution

Mutate along three axes: (1) ambiguity of cache freshness, (2) tool family (Read vs Grep vs Bash status), (3) intermediate distractor turns between original call and temptation. Preserve the 'authoritative prior result in-context' invariant — that is the load-bearing constraint.

Run-level focus: Pressure the agent's decision to re-invoke a tool whose prior result is still authoritative in-context — file re-reads after a no-op edit, search re-runs with id...
